ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-10-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-22-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ashley Day appeared by zoom for Farida Sheikh.

The court stated that the concern has to do with testamentary intent, that it appears the petition was filed in London and then the petition here is an ancillary petition, noted that some family members are in the United States and some are in London, and that the petition is to divide $217,000.00 amongst the sisters, but the problem is whether or not the intent was to have a trust. Ms. Day stated that the decedent had four children (3 daughters and one son), that the son predeceased the decedent and left two children, and that Nazleen is the granddaughter who is in London. Ms. Day also stated that the intent was to have two named individuals handle everything and distribute everything, but Nazleen was appointed by the court in London because the named executors declined to act. In addition, Ms. Day stated this is a request to take $217,000.00 that was in a San Francisco bank account and have it distributed amongst the three sisters who are in the United States. Furthermore, Ms. Day stated that she does not think there was any intent to have things held in trust for any length of time, that the intent was more of a procedural thing, that the business in London has all been taken care of and all of the assets in London have been distributed, and that everything has been distributed and dealt with except for this bank account. Ms. Day also stated that she is not aware of anything regarding the law in the UK that this court needs to consider, that she has spoken with a daughter and another family member, that having the granddaughter appointed in the UK was a matter of convenience, that there are no issues and that everything was resolved there. Ms. Day asked that if the court determines that a testamentary trust needs to be created, that it appoints the daughter to be the trustee and stated that the end result would be to distribute just as they would do now. The Amended of Account and Report of Administrator, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: L. Maloney. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-15-2021 Continued To Feb-08-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar May-04-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ashley Day, via ZOOM, counsel for Farida Sheikh, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court mentions to counsel that it appears that the Apostille of the will and Apostille of the order admitting the will in the U.K. submitted to the court have been verified by a Solicitor, located in the U.K. and not the court. After further discussion, the court confirms with counsel and in open court whether there are any objections to the Will in this matter being admitted, no objections are presented. The Will dated December 03, 1992 is admitted to Probate. Farida Sheikh is appointed Administrator with Will Annexed with Full IAEA authority. Bond is not required. Status of Closing of the Estate is set for May 10, 2022 at 9:00 am in Department 204. The matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Apr-06-2021 Continued To May-04-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
